title: Senior Marketing Analyst (m/w/d) – E-Commerce & Online Marketing
required_skills: 5+ years experience in data-driven online marketing analytics
Performance Marketing Analytics (SEA, Paid Social, Display, Affiliate)
Web Analytics tools (Google Analytics 4, Adobe Analytics)
bonus_skills: Python or R for advanced analysis
core_responsibilities: Tracking setup oversight and UTM taxonomy management
Campaign performance analysis across all channels (ROAS, CPM, CPC, CTR)
Conversion and funnel analysis by channel/device/audience
Multi-touch attribution model design and maintenance
A/B and multivariate testing conception and evaluation
recommended_emphasis: Lead with A/B testing, funnel analysis, and attribution experience
Highlight Power BI (PL-300 certified) and Looker Studio as BI tools match
Frame Moli Media e-commerce funnel work prominently
Frame HSBC budget analytics as multi-touch attribution analogue
Acknowledge SQL gap — do not fabricate SQL experience
State German as B1+, do not overstate
